The custom subdomain name used to access the API. Defaults to the value of the name parameter.

chart.title: Average processor and process CPU utilization

metadata.description: Service principal that should be granted read access to the KeyVault. If unset, no service principal is granted access by default

variables.defaultAccessPolicies: [if(not(empty(parameters('principalId'))), createArray(createObject('objectId', parameters('principalId'), 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get', 'list')), 'tenantId', subscription().tenantId)), createArray())]

properties.accessPolicies: [union(variables('defaultAccessPolicies'), createArray(createObject('objectId', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('name'))), '2023-01-31').principalId, 'permissions', createObject('secrets', createArray('get', 'list', 'set', 'delete'), 'keys', createArray('get', 'list'), 'certificates', createArray('get', 'list')), 'tenantId', subscription().tenantId)))]

metadata.description: Creates a role assignment for a service principal.
Creates a role assignment for a service principal.

variables.secrets: [map(filter(variables('appSettingsArray'), lambda('i', not(equals(tryGet(lambdaVariables('i'), 'secret'), null())))), lambda('i', createObject('name', lambdaVariables('i').name, 'value', lambdaVariables('i').value, 'secretRef', coalesce(tryGet(lambdaVariables('i'), 'secretRef'), take(replace(replace(toLower(lambdaVariables('i').name), '_', '-'), '.', '-'), 32)))))]
variables.env: [map(filter(variables('appSettingsArray'), lambda('i', equals(tryGet(lambdaVariables('i'), 'secret'), null()))), lambda('i', createObject('name', lambdaVariables('i').name, 'value', lambdaVariables('i').value)))]

containers.name: main
containers.env: [union(createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('applicationInsightsName')), '2020-02-02').ConnectionString), createObject('name', 'PORT', 'value', '80'), createObject('name', 'OpenAI__Endpoint', 'value', parameters('openaiEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'OpenAI__IdentityClientId', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2023-01-31').clientId), createObject('name', 'Azure__SignalR__Endpoint', 'value', format('https://{0}', parameters('signalrEndpoint'))), createObject('name', 'Azure__SignalR__IdentityClientId', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2023-01-31').clientId), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('identityName')), '2023-01-31').clientId), createObject('name', 'MS_DEFENDERFORCLOUD_ENABLED', 'value', parameters('msDefenderForCloudEnabled')), createObject('name', 'APPLICATION_NAME', 'value', parameters('applicationName'))), variables('env'), map(variables('secrets'), lambda('secret', createObject('name', lambdaVariables('secret').name, 'secretRef', lambdaVariables('secret').secretRef))))]
